_description: Add one entry per Figma file. Each file posts design change alerts to its own Slack channel. Comment @mentions trigger DMs to the mentioned person via the bot.

files._description: key: Figma file ID from the URL. slackWebhook: name of the GitHub secret holding that team's Slack channel webhook URL.
files.label: Project Name

slackDmNameOverrides._description: Only needed if someone's full name differs between Figma and Slack. Key is their Figma display name, value is their Slack user ID (found in their Slack profile). Example: 'Marcus Graham': 'U0ABC123'
